title: How to Set up: YouTube Channel Guidelines
excerpt: Shows how to set up YouTube channel guidelines with an intro message and up to three custom community rules.
contentHtml:
Transcript

With a new YouTube channel guidelines feature, you can easily explain your community rules to your new viewers and chatters. To add channel guidelines, open the community tab in your settings in YouTube studio, then switch to channel guidelines. You can provide an introductory message for your viewers as well as filling out three text boxes for custom rules.
